title: Harden daily incubator rejection gate after weak gadget idea
description: User reported the 100-days incubator is failing by surfacing weak commodity gadget ideas (example: keychain micro-corkscrew) that should be killed before final delivery. Root cause likely prompt/config drift: sources.yml still says novelty_or_timing and cron prompt may not enforce app/SaaS + competitor/substitute kill gate strongly enough. Acceptance: update docs/config/cron prompt so shortlist ideas must be software/app bets, commodity physical products are rejected unless explicitly requested, competitor/substitute gate has hard kill conditions, and final delivery shows rejected candidates rather than pitching a no-wedge SKU.
close_reason: Hardened app scope and commodity gadget kill gate in docs/config/cron prompt
